All right, now that we have everything in place, it's time to get it all to that sheet. In order to do that, we're going to need to go ahead and set up a Zapier account. So if you want to go ahead and click the button on the bottom of the screen that says Zapier sign up, it's going to take you to a page that looks like this. From here, all you're going to want to do is follow along with the prompts. So you can go ahead and enter in your email and your name and click sign up. You'll create a password, so do remember to write this down. And then, beer it. So from here, there are going to be a few questions that you'll want to answer. My favorite, getting to click this business owner entrepreneur button. From there, you'll click continue. And then you're just going to link up the apps that you typically use. So we're going to be doing click funnels, Google Sheets and Acuity. From here, you'll click the finish setup button. And it'll take you to your dashboard. It'll have a few suggested saps down here, but we're going to make our own in the next video.
